summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected. Four non-security PRs remain open as related or independent, and #87560 is routed item-scoped to central security handling after deterministic validation flagged it as security-sensitive.

actions.reason: Useful focused runtime PR should stay open for the runtime/EBADF follow-up path; it is not low-signal, duplicate, superseded, or closable in this job.
Independent Discord behavior fix with active review/check state; keep open rather than close or route into another canonical path.
Related test coverage for #85103 should stay open; it is not a duplicate, not low-signal under the enabled policy set, and close/fix/merge actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Draft partial mitigation related to #87544 should stay open for author/proof follow-up; it is not safe to close or promote as the canonical fix path.

Route #87560 to central OpenClaw security handling because deterministic validation marked this exact PR security-sensitive; keep the rest of the inventory shard non-mutating and independently classified.
